revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing categories I made

<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Mbox
| type = notice
| image =
| text =
This page is used by [[User:TolBot|TolBot]]{{#if:{{{task|}}}|'s [[:m:User:TolBot/Task {{{task}}}|Task {{{task}}}]]}}. Please notify [[User:Tol]], its operator, before making major or breaking changes. Thank you. {{{text|}}}
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc||<includeonly>[[Category:Pages used by TolBot {{#if:{{{task|}}}|Task {{{task}}}}}]]</includeonly>}}
